final_response: No — per the 2026-04-15 decision, all four Q2 engineering hires are mid-level (3–7 YoE); no staff or senior staff recs open this quarter, with a re-evaluation at Q3 planning. Recruiting should send the "not this round" decline; if they want to push for an exception, route it to CEO/CTO to reverse/supersede the decision rather than open the rec quietly.
